placeholderImages.description: 3D minimal SaaS landing page hero illustration for CVEEEZ, wide 16:9. Composition: keep the LEFT 40% clean empty negative space for headline and CTA (no objects, no text). On the RIGHT side: a large rounded white resume/document card with subtle UI placeholders, plus a small floating 3D job search bar with a briefcase icon. Three floating 3D rounded badges with ICONS ONLY (no text): top-right green check (ATS), center sparkles/AI icon, and bottom-left document/PDF icon. Dark navy-to-teal gradient background (#0B1220 to #0E2A3A) with gentle vignette, premium tech aesthetic. Brand accents: teal (#136A66) and orange (#C65C2B) used subtly on icons/highlights only. Soft studio lighting, glow, depth of field, ultra high resolution, clean, minimal. No people, no faces, no logos, no watermark, no text.
Clean mobile app mockup on a simple neutral background. Focus on professional UI and clear document layout. No people, minimalist composition.
